preamble: The nasalized vowel [ẽ] reduces to schwa [ə] in unstressed syllables through stress-conditioned vowel reduction. This process is documented in Romance languages, where nasalization is lost as the vowel centralizes to schwa in weak positions.

examples.note: Nasalized [ẽ] reduces to schwa in unstressed contexts, losing nasalization in the process.
Reduction of nasalized [ẽ] in unstressed syllables with denasalization.
